---
# screenshot: framed
format:
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      top: 0.75in
      bottom: 0.75in
      left: 0.6in
      right: 0.6in
    grid:
      body-width: 4.5in
      margin-width: 1.5in
      gutter-width: 0.3in
    page-numbering: ""
---

::: {.column-page}
```{=typst}
#block(fill: rgb("#b9cfe2"), width: 100%, height: 6cm, radius: 1pt)
```
:::

::: {.column-margin}
```{=typst}
#v(2cm)
#block(fill: rgb("#cfcfcf"), width: 100%, height: 6cm, radius: 1pt)
```
:::

```{=typst}
#block(fill: rgb("#d6d6d6"), width: 100%, height: 8cm, radius: 1pt)
```
